question: [File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/balance/BalanceDownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: Critical: Any impact caused by Tampering/Manipulating Hashgraph history'] [Function: isWriteSignatures()] Can an unprivileged external user enable `writeSignatures = true` and then exploit a race condition on the written signature files to replace them with forged signatures before they are read back, corrupting the Hashgraph signature audit trail?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/balance/BalanceDownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: Critical: Any impact caused by Tampering/Manipulating Hashgraph history'] [Function: getCommon()] Can an unprivileged external user set `CommonDownloaderProperties.timeout` to an extremely small value, causing all legitimate balance file downloads to time out and be skipped, while a fast attacker-controlled server serves forged balance files within the timeout window to inject tampered Hashgraph history?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/balance/BalanceDownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: Critical: Any impact caused by Tampering/Manipulating Hashgraph history'] [Function: getCommon()] Can an unprivileged external user set `CommonDownloaderProperties.batchSize` to 1 to cause the downloader to process only one signature file per node per cycle, dramatically slowing balance history ingestion and creating exploitable gaps in Hashgraph history?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/balance/BalanceDownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: Critical: Any impact caused by Tampering/Manipulating Hashgraph history'] [Function: isEnabled()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the DEMO network shortcut in `Downloader.downloadNextBatch()` — where `enabled` is set to `false` after the demo bucket is exhausted — by spoofing the network name as `DEMO` to permanently disable balance file downloads and freeze Hashgraph history?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/balance/BalanceDownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: Critical: Any impact caused by Tampering/Manipulating Hashgraph history'] [Function: getCommon()] Can an unprivileged external user set `CommonDownloaderProperties.allowAnonymousAccess = true` to cause the downloader to use anonymous credentials when accessing the balance file bucket, enabling a man-in-the-middle attacker to serve forged balance files from a public bucket with the same name and corrupt Hashgraph history?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/balance/BalanceDownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: Critical: Any impact caused by Tampering/Manipulating Hashgraph history'] [Function: getCommon()] Can an unprivileged external user set `CommonDownloaderProperties.accessKey` and `secretKey` to credentials for an attacker-controlled cloud account, redirecting balance file downloads to a bucket under attacker control and enabling injection of forged Hashgraph balance history?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/balance/BalanceDownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: Critical: Any impact caused by Tampering/Manipulating Hashgraph history'] [Function: getCommon()] Can an unprivileged external user set `CommonDownloaderProperties.region` to a region where an attacker controls a bucket with the same name, causing the balance downloader to fetch forged balance files from the attacker's bucket and corrupt Hashgraph history?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/balance/BalanceDownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: Critical: Any impact caused by Tampering/Manipulating Hashgraph history'] [Function: getFrequency()] Can an unprivileged external user craft a `frequency` Duration string that parses to a valid but astronomically large value (e.g., `PT999999999S`), effectively disabling balance file polling and causing the mirror node to serve permanently stale Hashgraph balance history?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/balance/BalanceDownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: Critical: Any impact caused by Tampering/Manipulating Hashgraph history'] [Function: isEnabled()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the fact that `enabled` is a mutable field (Lombok `@Data` generates a setter) to trigger a runtime configuration refresh that toggles balance downloading off, causing a window where Hashgraph balance history is not ingested and can be manipulated?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/balance/BalanceDownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: Critical: Any impact caused by Tampering/Manipulating Hashgraph history'] [Function: isPersistBytes()] Can an unprivileged external user toggle `persistBytes` on and off via a live configuration refresh to cause inconsistent raw byte persistence, creating a partial Hashgraph balance history in the database that can be exploited to serve contradictory balance states?
